name: inference-margins-mcp-worker
description: Cloudflare Workers (remote streamable-HTTP) deployment of the inference-margins MCP server. The shared tool/shape/label sources are copied verbatim from ../src at build time (scripts/build.mjs) — mcp-server/src stays the single source of truth; only engine.ts (bundler import), reports.ts (live-site fetch) and get_report.ts (async read) are worker-native.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && wrangler deploy
